source: Curated provider naming conventions. Actor cross-references are derived live from the loaded MISP Galaxy + curated Big 4 catalog.

providers.name: Microsoft
providers.lexicon: Weather + nation-state: Typhoon = China, Blizzard = Russia, Sandstorm = Iran, Sleet = North Korea. Storm-#### marks emerging/unattributed clusters; the legacy scheme used chemical elements (e.g., Strontium, Phosphorus).

providers.name: CrowdStrike
providers.lexicon: Animal denotes the suspected sponsor: Panda = China, Bear = Russia, Kitten = Iran, Chollima = North Korea, Spider = eCrime, Jackal = hacktivist.

providers.name: Mandiant
providers.lexicon: Numbered clusters: APT## (state-nexus), FIN## (financially motivated), UNC#### (uncategorized), TEMP.* (temporary).

providers.name: MITRE ATT&CK
providers.lexicon: G#### group identifiers, mapped to a common name and aliases.

providers.name: Secureworks
providers.lexicon: Metal + word: BRONZE / IRON / GOLD / COBALT (e.g., BRONZE MOHAWK); older Threat Group IDs use TG-####.

providers.name: Recorded Future
providers.lexicon: TAG-## activity groups and color-coded clusters.
